WHAT IS HEADSHOT 3?
Headshot 3 is the most widely adopted plugin for Character Creator, enabling the creation of high-quality, real-time digital humans from photos and 3D models. Its image-based workflow is powered by a proprietary image-to-3D AI model, transforming ordinary facial images into highly detailed CC characters while preserving accurate likeness. Its flexible, comprehensive mesh-based workflow also leads the industry in the seamless conversion of static models into fully rigged 3D heads.
Image Workflow
Turn Any Photo into a 3D Head
Create realistic digital doubles from a single photo using an AI-powered workflow. Benefit from automatic 3D head generation, topology and shape refinement, camera lens correction, normal map creation, texture reprojection, and more.
Learn More ↗
Mesh Workflow
Convert 3D Scans & Sculpts into Rigged Characters
Convert static head models into fully rigged CC characters using automatic head wrapping, mesh refinement, and texture baking. The workflow is optimized for photogrammetry, sculpted assets, and mobile-scanned models.
Learn More ↗

FEATURES
HEADSHOT 2
HEADSHOT 3
CC Version Requirement
Character Creator 4
Character Creator 5
Image Workflow
Standard image-to-head generation with options for both basic and professional workflows.
Next-generation, highly precise proprietary AI model for image-to-head generation.
Mesh Workflow
3D face wrap, mesh brushes, and support for CC5 HD workflow.
3D face wrap, mesh brushes, and support for CC5 HD workflow.
Preset Morphs
-
58 facial presets designed to enhance depth and highlight unique features. Each applied preset includes an adjustable slider for fine-tuning.
Spline-Based Reshaper
-
Supports portrait and profile views for precise alignment of features such as double eyelids and nasolabial folds, enabling more accurate facial animation.
*AI Image Generation
-
Text-to-image generation with portrait images up to 4K resolution and side or full-body images up to 2K resolution.
*AI Image Enhancement
-
Source photo enhancement tools, including head leveling, expression neutralization, lighting correction, stray hair removal, and 4K upscaling.
Sculpt Morphs
Direct on-screen facial sculpting that streamlines morph application.
Direct on-screen facial sculpting that streamlines morph application. Sculpt morphs are optimized for Character Creator 5.
Body Matching
Choose from several body shape options.
Generate base body according to source image or from preset options.
Texture Re-projection & Placement
Image projection after applying mesh changes.
Image projection that updates after mesh modifications, with the ability to replace textures using enhanced source images.
Exclusive Complementary Bundle
Headshot Morph 1000+
Headshot Morph 1400+
Note: AI Image Generation in Headshot 3 is powered by Google Nano Banana and requires the use of credits for each generation.
